description_long: This street light features a tall, slender cylindrical metal pole with a single, gently curved arm extending outward near the top. The arm supports a modern, streamlined lamp head with a smooth, aerodynamic shape, likely designed for efficient light distribution and minimal wind resistance. A small, rectangular green sign is attached to the pole at a lower height, adding a touch of color and functional signage. The pole itself is plain and unadorned, with a consistent metallic finish throughout. The lamp head is positioned to direct light downward, ideal for illuminating streets or sidewalks. The overall design is utilitarian and contemporary, suitable for urban environments.
description: A tall, plain metal street light with a single curved arm and a modern, streamlined lamp head, featuring a small green sign attached to the pole.
description_view_0: The curved arm and lamp head are clearly visible, along with the green sign on the pole.
description_view_1: The street light is seen from the side, showing the thin profile of the arm and lamp head, with the sign barely visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the street light, again showing the curved arm and lamp head, with the green sign visible.
description_view_3: A rear view showing the back of the lamp head and the pole, with minimal detail on the arm and sign.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, streamlined, aerodynamic lamp head with a smooth, elongated oval shape and no visible decorative elements or coverings.
